content:
✨ b4 | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Circumventing network censorship and restrictions imposed by Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) systems.
✨ Key Features: • Bypasses Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) • Uses netfilter queue manipulation • Provides a web UI for management • Real-time metrics (connections, packets, bandwidth) • Logs streaming with filtering
📖 Summary: B4 is a network packet processor designed to bypass Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) systems. It achieves this by manipulating network traffic using netfilter queueing on Linux systems, offering a user-friendly web interface for management and real-time monitoring.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
